goal: Довести до честного terminal verdict вопрос: может ли новый directional feature layer + CatBoost classification дать additive sleeve поверх active-signal-v1@1 при корректных labels, полном покрытии sides/horizons и минимальном feature core.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify base snapshot, its hours, days, thresholds, execution, feature set, label scheme, horizon or architecture.
No improvement claim without matched OOS comparison against base on the same window.
Never return to PnL regression or IV-family as standalone directional layer.
Labels frozen after stage_2 — no drift permitted through selection-stage.
No multiclass models, no router, until at least one standalone sleeve passes lockbox OOS.
Short-first priority: short 18h and short 12h before any new long tests.
Lockbox window untouched until stage_9; all model/threshold choices made on selection OOS only.
Only compact directional feature packs — no broad feature brainstorming before core debts closed.

stages.title: Closure-audit v6 и фиксация инвариантов v7
stages.objective: Honestly document what v6 left incomplete and lock immutable reference parameters before any new work begins.
actions: Open a new research_project for v7.
Record in research_memory: what v6 closed, what remains pending, which conclusions are final.
Pin immutable baseline ref: snapshot_id=active-signal-v1, version=1, symbol=BTCUSDT, anchor=1h, execution=5m.
Define research_map atlas axes: branch, feature_family, side, horizon, label_scheme, model_stage, final_decision.
Create open-items register for: v6_short_12h, v6_short_18h, v6_long_18h, barrier_label_contract, critical_directional_core, matched_oos_with_base, final_model_route_verdict.
success_criteria: v7 project exists with unique project_id.
v6 closure audit node recorded in research_memory.
Atlas dimensions defined in research_map.
Open-items register contains all 7 required items.

stages.title: Freeze barrier-label contract
stages.objective: Eliminate the plan-vs-execution label drift from v6 by formally freezing exactly two label schemes for all sides and horizons.
actions: Approve exactly two label schemes: balanced_barrier and conservative_barrier.
For each horizon (12h, 18h) and each side (long_success, short_success) define: success movement threshold, adverse break threshold, cost accounting, ambiguous-case handling.
Record the complete label specification in research_memory.
Declare labels frozen — no changes allowed until selection-stage is complete.
success_criteria: Both label schemes fully specified for all 4 side×horizon combinations.
net_pnl>0 explicitly excluded as primary label scheme.
Label contract recorded and marked frozen.
stages.gate_hint: Cannot proceed to feature or modeling work without frozen labels.

stages.title: Достроить critical directional core
stages.objective: Build only the missing directional features essential for v7 verdict — short-deterioration group first, then long-recovery, then context.
actions: Build and validate short-first missing features: cf_failed_move_reject_6h, cf_rollover_before_daily, cf_fast_slow_regime_gap, cf_event_failure_combo.
Build and validate long support features: cf_failed_move_reclaim_6h, cf_reversal_quality_6h, cf_range_escape_quality_12h, cf_recovery_before_daily.
Build and validate context features: cf_expiry_leadership_conflict, cf_funding_breadth_conflict, cf_event_regime_asymmetry, cf_state_instability_score.
For each feature: validate, publish, materialize, check coverage, check warmup, verify causality.
Record results per feature in a tracking table with priority_group, validation status, materialization, coverage, warmup_ok.
success_criteria: All short-first priority features validated and published.
All long support features validated and published.
All context features validated and published.
No coverage or warmup issues on any included feature.
Total new features count and materialization status recorded.

stages.title: Dataset split и modeling surfaces
stages.objective: Freeze train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows and prepare modeling surfaces after core features are finalized.
actions: Confirm frozen windows: train, selection OOS, lockbox OOS.
Prepare three modeling surfaces: full_surface, base_absent_surface, weak_window_surface (deferred if not needed).
Build managed feature datasets for each surface.
Record that pack selection and threshold selection use selection OOS only; lockbox untouched.
success_criteria: Frozen windows confirmed and recorded.
At least full_surface and base_absent_surface datasets built.
Selection rule documented: all choices on selection OOS, lockbox sealed.

stages.title: Short-first plausibility stage
stages.objective: Train and evaluate short-side models (M1_short_12h, M2_short_18h) on selection OOS to confirm directional plausibility before any long work.
actions: Train M1_short_cls_12h with short-deterioration feature pack.
Train M2_short_cls_18h with short-deterioration feature pack.
Evaluate each on selection OOS: ROC AUC, PR AUC, precision in top decile, lift vs base rate, calibration sanity.
Check economic sanity: mean realized outcome in top bucket, monotonicity across buckets, no micro-sample-only edge.
Decide promote-to-full-training for each model.
success_criteria: M1_short_12h evaluated with AUC, PR, top-decile precision, economic plausibility.
M2_short_18h evaluated with same metrics.
Promotion decision recorded for each model.

stages.title: Long 18h plausibility stage
stages.objective: Test long 18h with Leadership-Breadth, Path-Asymmetry, and Long-Recovery-Core packs — only after short side has been honestly evaluated.
actions: Train M3_long_cls_18h with balanced_barrier and conservative_barrier labels.
Use feature packs: Leadership-Breadth, Path-Asymmetry, Long-Recovery-Core.
Evaluate on selection OOS with same metric set as short models.
Decide promotion to full training.
success_criteria: M3_long_18h evaluated on both label schemes.
AUC, PR, top-decile, economic plausibility recorded.
Promotion decision recorded.

stages.title: Full training и frozen model candidates
stages.objective: Retrain promoted models to final frozen state with locked hyperparameters for lockbox evaluation.
actions: For each model promoted from plausibility stages: retrain with final hyperparameters.
Freeze model version in registry with best iteration recorded.
Verify selection OOS metrics hold after final training.
Mark each model as frozen_for_lockbox.
success_criteria: All promoted models frozen in model registry.
Parameters and best iteration recorded.
Selection OOS metrics confirmed.
Models ready for sleeve conversion.

stages.title: Превращение лучших моделей в tradeable sleeves
stages.objective: Convert frozen models into tradeable sleeves with frozen thresholds ready for OOS backtest.
actions: For each frozen model, create a sleeve with threshold tier determined on selection OOS.
Freeze thresholds before any lockbox exposure.
Publish model-backed custom features if applicable.
Record expected signal density for each sleeve.
success_criteria: Each promoted model has a sleeve_id with frozen threshold.
Thresholds set on selection OOS only.
Sleeves marked ready_for_oos_backtest.

stages.title: Matched OOS comparison против базы
stages.objective: Run lockbox OOS backtests for each sleeve and compare matched performance against the immutable base strategy.
actions: Run lockbox OOS backtest for each sleeve.
Run matched base strategy backtest on the same lockbox window.
Compare: PnL, trade count, profit factor, max drawdown, avg trade, median trade.
Record all results in comparison table.
success_criteria: Lockbox backtest completed for all sleeves.
Base comparison available on the same window.
Performance metrics recorded per sleeve and per base run.

stages.title: Ownership, cannibalization и proof of new entries
stages.objective: Prove that each candidate sleeve adds genuinely new profitable trades rather than cannibalizing the base strategy.
actions: Measure overlap rate between sleeve trades and base trades.
Count truly new trades introduced by the sleeve.
Count base trades replaced/cannibalized.
Calculate PnL contribution of new trades only.
Check if weak-window repair is observed.
Record final per-candidate decision: accept or reject.
success_criteria: Overlap rate computed for every candidate.
New-trade PnL contribution quantified.
Ownership_positive flag set per candidate.
Final accept/reject decision documented.

stages.title: Финальный вердикт по v7
stages.objective: Write the terminal verdict on whether the classification + directional feature route produces an additive sleeve, and recommend the next research direction.
actions: Summarize: total features built, label contract used, models trained.
Record verdicts: short_12h, short_18h, long_18h, model_route overall.
State classification route verdict: confirmed or rejected.
Confirm base strategy was never modified.
Write final v7 report in research_memory.
Update research_map with final decisions on all atlas axes.
Recommend next research direction.
success_criteria: All open items from stage_1 resolved.
Terminal verdict recorded for model route.
Final v7 report persisted.
Operational checklist fully checked.

warnings: Plan is in Russian; stage titles, objectives and actions translated/summarized for semantic clarity.
v6 left short side, 18h horizon, label contract and several feature families incomplete — v7 is a closure pass, not a new search.
